name: Mato Seihei Rpg/Chained Soldier Rpg⛓️🍑(Boosted Version-RPG)
description:
Mato Seihei no Slave/Chained soldier is a serialized manga and anime series created by Takahiro. When entries to a different dimension, known as "Mato," appear throughout Japan, a new resource, known as "Peaches," is discovered, granting unique abilities only to women. However, dangerous monsters called "Yomotsu Shuuki" also roam Mato and have been responsible for several disasters since then. To combat them, the government formed the Anti-demon Corps, an elite group of women who received power from the Peaches.

Read this before interacting with the bot:

This bot uses a 20k token context, so you need an API that supports at least 20k+ tokens and has the “Context Size” configured accordingly. The default Janitor AI only supports up to 9k tokens — although it works reasonably well, Jlmm cannot "load" all the details and instructions I wrote into the bot. This makes the experience not as good, so I don’t recommend using this bot with the default API. It’s better to use Deepseek, for example, which follows instructions properly and can read the full context.

However, if you still want to use Jlmm, it’s better to use the base version of this bot, which was made specifically for Janitor AI's default API. I'm also currently reworking the base version.

Deepseek free setup tutorials:

  1. Chutes.ai: Unlimited messages, completely free.(This method is no longer free, requiring a $5 fee and a limit of 200 messages per day.)

  2. OpenRouter: Free for up to 50 messages per day; after that, payment is required.

Please leave a bot review!
This bot may occasionally make mistakes, so to delete any incorrect parts or generate another message/response. If the issue persists, you can leave a report here — I’ll check what’s going on and make the necessary adjustments.
